column.name: SystemDriveFreeGB
column.description: Free space on the system drive in GB.

column.name: SystemDriveSizeGB
column.description: Total size of the system drive in GB.

fields.label: Physical disk health
fields.collector:
$disks = @()
foreach ($d in (Get-PhysicalDisk -ErrorAction Stop | Where-Object { $_.BusType -match 'NVMe|SATA|SAS|ATAPI|RAID' } | Sort-Object DeviceID)) {
    $rc = Get-PhysicalDisk -UniqueId $d.UniqueId | Get-StorageReliabilityCounter -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue
    $disks += [pscustomobject]@{
        DiskNumber             = $d.DeviceID
        FriendlyName           = $d.FriendlyName
        HealthStatus           = "$($d.HealthStatus)"
        MediaType              = "$($d.MediaType)"
        Wear                   = [int]$rc.Wear
        ReadErrorsTotal        = [int]$rc.ReadErrorsTotal
        ReadErrorsUncorrected  = [int]$rc.ReadErrorsUncorrected
        WriteErrorsTotal       = [int]$rc.WriteErrorsTotal
        WriteErrorsUncorrected = [int]$rc.WriteErrorsUncorrected
        Temperature            = [int]$rc.Temperature
        TemperatureMax         = [int]$rc.TemperatureMax
    }
}
$disks

column.name: DiskHealth
column.description: Per-physical-disk health (wear, read/write errors, temperature, media type, health status) as a JSON array.
